criteria_results.criterion: PC版で各 split header に status indicator が表示される（headerExtras 経由の配線）
criteria_results.evidence: TerminalSplitPaneContent.tsx:184-201 builds `statusIndicator` (inline span) and passes it via `headerExtras={statusIndicator}` to TerminalSplitPane (L300). TerminalSplitPane.tsx renders `{headerExtras}` in the split header (L35 prop, L135 render). Test 'split-status-indicator-${splitIndex}' confirms it is present.
criteria_results.notes: Wiring verified end-to-end: parent renderSplitPane -> TerminalSplitPaneContent -> TerminalSplitPane header slot.

criteria_results.criterion: 状態→色/形マッピング（idle→グレーdot / ready→緑dot / waiting→黄dot / running・generating→青スピナー）が実 SIDEBAR_STATUS_CONFIG 準拠。'processing' は使わない
criteria_results.evidence: statusConfig = SIDEBAR_STATUS_CONFIG[cliStatus] (TerminalSplitPaneContent.tsx:184). status-colors.ts: idle=bg-gray-500/dot, ready=bg-green-500/dot, waiting=bg-yellow-500/dot, running=border-blue-500/spinner, generating=border-blue-500/spinner. Spinner branch keyed on statusConfig.type==='spinner' (L187). it.each test asserts all 5 values produce the matching className and dot/spinner. grep confirms no 'processing' literal in the changed code.
criteria_results.notes: Uses statusConfig.className (not colorClass) and statusConfig.type==='spinner' exactly per config; BranchStatus type has no 'processing' member.

criteria_results.criterion: スプリットA=running→青スピナー / B=idle→グレーdot が独立して表示される（per-split data-testid）
criteria_results.evidence: data-testid=`split-status-indicator-${splitIndex}` (L191/L197) makes each split's indicator addressable. Test 'renders each split status independently (A=running spinner, B=idle dot)' renders split 0 cliStatus=running (border-blue-500 + animate-spin) and split 1 cliStatus=idle (bg-gray-500, no animate-spin) and asserts both independently. PASSED.
criteria_results.notes: splitIndex flows through to the testid and to the parent-derived per-CLI status.

criteria_results.criterion: worktree切替・CLI切替後も対応する status が反映される
criteria_results.evidence: renderSplitPane derives paneCliStatus = deriveCliStatus(worktree?.sessionStatusByCli?.[paneCli]) (WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1484) keyed on the pane's own CLI (paneCli) and the current worktree's sessionStatusByCli; worktreeId and worktree?.sessionStatusByCli are in the renderSplitPane useCallback deps (L1515,1526). Changing CLI/worktree re-derives and propagates the new status.
criteria_results.notes: Per-CLI keyed lookup ensures CLI switch reflects the correct status; worktree change re-renders via dep on worktree?.sessionStatusByCli.

criteria_results.criterion: sessionStatusByCli ポーリング更新で indicator 自動更新、かつ status 不変周期では split 再renderされない（memo-safe / S3-001）
criteria_results.evidence: Parent passes only the derived BranchStatus string (cliStatus={paneCliStatus}) to the memo'd child (WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1510). TerminalSplitPaneContent is React.memo (L99); statusIndicator useMemo deps are [statusConfig.type, statusConfig.className, statusConfig.label, splitIndex] (L200) — all derived solely from the status string. A polling tick that leaves the resolved status unchanged yields an unchanged string prop, so the memo'd child does not re-render. Comment at WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1480-1483 documents S3-001.
criteria_results.notes: Only the resolved string crosses the memo boundary, not the raw sessionStatusByCli object.

criteria_results.criterion: 新 prop cliStatus は optional、未指定時は 'idle'（グレーdot）にフォールバック（既存呼び出し元/テスト無改修 / S3-002）
criteria_results.evidence: Prop declared `cliStatus?: BranchStatus` (L96) with default `cliStatus = 'idle'` (L114). Test 'falls back to idle (gray dot) when cliStatus is omitted' renders without the prop and asserts bg-gray-500 + no animate-spin. The 13 pre-#743 tests (#728/#740) call TerminalSplitPaneContent without cliStatus and still pass unchanged.
criteria_results.notes: Backward compatible; no existing call site required modification.

criteria_results.criterion: アクセシビリティ属性は Mobile 正準に合わせ title のみ（aria-label との二重読み上げ回避 / S3-006）
criteria_results.evidence: Indicator span sets only `title={statusConfig.label}` (L190/196); no aria-label. Test asserts `indicator.getAttribute('title')` is truthy and `getAttribute('aria-label')` is null. Mirrors Mobile canonical span at WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1971-1978 (title only).
criteria_results.notes: Markup is identical to the Mobile canonical span (w-2 h-2 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 [+ border-2 border-t-transparent animate-spin for spinner]).

criteria_results.criterion: モバイル版の status indicator 挙動は変更なし（WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1947-1974 を変更しない）
criteria_results.evidence: `git show 9f2f227f -- WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx` shows the ONLY changes are 11 additions inside the renderSplitPane callback (hunks @@ -1477 / -1501 / -1513): added paneCliStatus derivation, cliStatus prop pass-through, and worktree?.sessionStatusByCli dep. The Mobile path region (current L1944-1978, incl. the canonical AutoYesToggle at L1947 and per-tool status span at L1971-1978) is untouched by the #743 commit.
criteria_results.notes: #743 commit (9f2f227f) is purely additive; no Mobile-path lines were modified or removed.

criteria_results.criterion: npm run lint / npx tsc --noEmit / npm run test:unit / npm run build 全PASS
criteria_results.evidence: tsc --noEmit exit 0; npm run lint = 'No ESLint warnings or errors' exit 0; npm run test:unit = 358 files passed, 6710 passed / 7 skipped / 0 failed; npm run build exit 0, 'Compiled successfully'.
criteria_results.notes: Console.error lines in unit output are intentional negative-path logs from other suites (SidebarContext/WorktreesCacheProvider), not failures. Build ERROR line is a pre-existing Next.js dynamic-route static-analysis log unrelated to #743.

criteria_results.criterion: 回帰テスト追加（状態別描画 / 未指定フォールバック / per-split独立 の3系統）
criteria_results.evidence: tests/unit/components/worktree/TerminalSplitPaneContent.test.tsx 'status indicator in split header (Issue #743)' adds: (1) it.each 5-case state-specific dot/spinner+className+a11y, (2) omitted-prop idle fallback, (3) per-split independence (A=running spinner, B=idle dot). All PASSED in verbose run. Existing TerminalSplitPane.test.tsx (8 tests) and the 13 prior content tests remain green (24 total in the two split files).
criteria_results.notes: All 3 required regression systems present and passing; no regressions in the existing 358-file suite.

summary: All 10 acceptance criteria for Issue #743 PASS. Code review confirms the PC per-split header status indicator is wired via headerExtras with the exact SIDEBAR_STATUS_CONFIG mapping (idle/ready/waiting=dot, running/generating=blue spinner; no 'processing'), per-split data-testids, parent-derived memo-safe cliStatus propagation (S3-001), optional prop with 'idle' fallback (S3-002), and title-only a11y matching the Mobile canonical span (S3-006). git show of commit 9f2f227f confirms the Mobile path (renderSplitPane-only, +11 lines) was not modified. Quality gates: tsc=0, lint=0, test:unit=358 files/6710 passed/0 failed, build=Compiled successfully. The 3 required regression-test systems (state-specific render, omitted-prop fallback, per-split independence) were added and pass, with no regressions in the existing suite (TerminalSplitPane.test.tsx 8 + TerminalSplitPaneContent.test.tsx 16 = 24).
